---
title: "corvus.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/node/gateway/plugins/corvus.ts"
loc: 24
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.55
style_score: 9.42
intel_score: 7.00
overall_score: 8.39
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [FastifyInstance](file://fastify)
- [FastifyPluginAsync](file://fastify)
- [*](file://fastify-plugin)
- [CorvusProcess](file://../../core/CorvusProcess.js)

### Exports
- `corvusPlugin`
- `corvus`
- `fp`
